title: Somebody, Nothing, Anywhere
description: Indefinite pronouns: somebody / anybody / nobody / everybody — paired with -thing, -where. The rules about affirmative, negative, and questions.
summary_pt_br: Pronomes indefinidos em inglês: SOMEBODY/ANYBODY/NOBODY/EVERYBODY para pessoas, e combinações com -thing / -where. Regra: some- em afirmativas, any- em negativas/perguntas, no- para negação com verbo afirmativo.

scenes.text_en:
Maya walked into the empty classroom.
'IS ANYBODY HERE?' she called.
'NOBODY answered.' She looked around.
'THERE'S SOMEONE's bag. But SOMETHING is off.
NOTHING was on the board. NO ONE was in the hallway.'
She checked SOMEWHERE else — and found them all on the roof.
scenes.text_pt:
Maya entrou na sala vazia.
'TEM ALGUÉM AQUI?' chamou.
'NINGUÉM respondeu.' Olhou ao redor.
'TEM A MOCHILA DE ALGUÉM. Mas ALGO tá estranho.
NADA no quadro. NINGUÉM no corredor.'
Procurou EM OUTRO LUGAR — e achou todos no terraço.

scenes.title: The some/any/no/every system
scenes.body_en: Three roots: -ONE / -BODY (people, same meaning), -THING (things), -WHERE (places). Four prefixes: SOME (positive), ANY (questions/negatives), NO (negation with positive verb), EVERY (all). 'I see somebody' / 'Do you see anybody?' / 'I see nobody' (= I don't see anybody). TRAP: never use double negatives: 'I don't see nobody' is wrong.
scenes.body_pt: Sistema: ONE/BODY + THING + WHERE combinam com SOME/ANY/NO/EVERY. SOME = afirmativa. ANY = pergunta/negativa. NO = negação com verbo positivo. EVERY = todos. NUNCA use dupla negativa em inglês padrão.

examples.en: I saw somebody. / Did you see anybody? / I saw nobody.
examples.pt: 'I saw nobody' = 'I didn't see anybody'. Nunca misture.

items.pt: em algum lugar / nenhum / todo lugar

exercise.question: Complete: 'I didn't see ___ there.' (ninguém)
exercise.explanation: Negative verb (didn't) + ANY-. Avoid double negative.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Com verbo negativo: anybody, não nobody.

exercise.explanation: Five of the twelve. Learn the rest by combining.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco das doze. O resto combina igual.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Somebody, Nothing, Anywhere". Indefinite pronouns: somebody / anybody / nobody / everybody — paired with -thing, -where. The rules about affirmative, negative, and questions. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Somebody, Nothing, Anywhere". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Somebody, Nothing, Anywhere'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Somebody, Nothing, Anywhere".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: Perfect English Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Regras de gramática + exercícios interativos gratuitos.
